case_title: MANRIQUEZ, TONY vs. HOOK, HAROLD et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANRIQUEZ, TONY AS TO DEFENDANT HOOK, HAROLD DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT HOOK, HAROLD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT HOOK, HAROLD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT HOOK, HAROLD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HOOK, HAROLD
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT HOOK, HAROLD

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANRIQUEZ, TONY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-25-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-31-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THIS JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, TONY MANRIQUEZ SHALL HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 417 GOUGH STREET, #109. A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE BUT THERE WILL BE A STAY UNTIL 6-3-95. DEFENDANT, HAROLD HOOK, WILL VACATE THE PREMISES AT 417 GOUGH STREET, #109 BY NOON 6-3-95 AND RETURN THE KEYS TO THE PREMISES TO THE PLAINTIFF. IF DEFENDANT, HAROLD HOOK, COMPLIES WITH THE TERMS OF THIS AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF TONY MANRIQUES WILL WAIVE BACK RENT AND DISMISS THIS ACTION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOOK, HAROLD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 417 GOUGH #109, STAYED UNTIL JUN-03-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, NOON - IF DEFT VACATES BY THEN, PLTF SHALL WAIVE BACK RENT & DISMISS W/ PREJUDICE.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
